citation_and_locator: Lai, Yik-Po. 2019. Cantonese Equative Constructions in Typological Perspective. Cahiers de Linguistique Asie Orientale 48(1):61-85. DOI 10.1163/19606028-04801002; HKMU repository abstract
what_it_supports: Cantonese permits a degree-marker-only equative type and uses multiple equative degree markers, with a preference for a degree demonstrative over an equality morpheme.
limit: Abstract-level verification does not establish exact examples, full constraints, or parser structure.

citation_and_locator: Lai, Yik-Po. 2021. A Diachronic Typological Study of Equative Constructions in Cantonese. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 100(1):55-67. DOI 10.29499/CrCL.202101_100(1).0005; official CUHK PDF pp.57-64, examples 1-3, 19-24, 50-60
what_it_supports: Directly distinguishes resemblance, HAVE, degree-marker-only, LEARN/irrealis, and modern 同 + standard + 一樣 + 咁 profiles; gives exact Cantonese examples and diachronic boundaries.
limit: One author/research family; historical corpus frequency and author judgments do not establish unrestricted current productivity.

citation_and_locator: Lai, Yik-Po. 2023. A Large-Scale Comparative Dialectal Study of Chinese Equative Constructions. Bulletin of Chinese Linguistics 16(1):77-107. DOI 10.30184/BCL.202306_16(1).0006; author postprint sections 5-7, examples 11-13 and 65-71; EdUHK metadata
what_it_supports: Direct Hong Kong, Guangzhou, Zhaoqing, and broader dialect comparison; supports 同 + standard + 一樣咁 + parameter and documents parameter and regional differences between 一樣 and 一樣咁 profiles.
limit: Dialect survey, literature, platform data, and author fieldwork have different evidence families; do not pool Yue varieties or convert judgments into categorical parser negatives.

citation_and_locator: Luke & Wong 2015, The Hong Kong Cantonese Corpus: Design and Uses; official fcbond/hkcancor UTF-8 release at commit 39aeadf920e0b5ca93d0ad7792c59e740e7bdd65; UC-RQ-004-005-COMPARISON-HKCANCOR-ATTESTATION-R1.md
what_it_supports: Naturally attests resemblance 好似 Standard 咁 Parameter and parameterless 同 Standard 一樣 profiles; the 39 一樣-token screen contains no adjacent 一樣咁 hit.
limit: The corpus was recorded in 1997-1998, is small for subtype frequency, and was not designed to elicit comparison; zero 一樣咁 hits cannot override modern source judgments.
